text: Deep water running maintains VO2max equivalent to land-based running over a 6-week period in trained runners.
Deep water running maintains ventilatory threshold at the same level as land-based running over 6 weeks.
Deep water running maintains running economy comparable to land-based running over 6 weeks.
An effective deep water running program alternates 30-minute sessions at 90-100% VO2max with 60-minute sessions at 70-75% VO2max, performed 5 days per week.
specific_value: 30 min at 90-100% VO2max / 60 min at 70-75% VO2max, 5 d/wk

text: Deep water running does not alter body composition compared to land-based running over a 6-week training period.
Metabolic responses (blood glucose, blood lactate, plasma norepinephrine) are similar between deep water running and land-based running after 6 weeks of training.
